stemHtml: Descending to 5000 ft, altimeter shows 8000 ft with 1013 hPa set. Transition level is FL70. How should you report to ATC?

options.a: Passing flight level 80 descending flight level 50.
options.b: Passing 8000 feet on QNH 1013 descending to 5000 feet on local QNH.
options.d: Passing flight level 80 descending to altitude 5000 feet.
